title: AISI 1018 carbon steel — uniaxial tensile test (representative)
summary: ASTM E8, E=205 GPa, σy≈370 MPa, σu≈440 MPa, ε_f≈15% (NIST/ASM/MatWeb 공개 자료 representative)
author: NIST / ASM Handbook / MatWeb (representative)

sections.title: 시험 조건
sections.content_text: ASTM E8 / E8M 표준 인장시험. 시편: standard round bar. strain rate 0.005/s. 상온 23°C.

sections.title: 물성 요약
sections.content_text: E=205 GPa · σy=370 MPa (0.2% offset) · σu=440 MPa · ε_f=15% · n≈0.26

sections.title: 비고
sections.content_text: Representative public data. 실제 lot 별 변동 가능. raw 곡선은 attachment 참조.

title: TPU Shore A85 — hyperelastic tensile test (representative)
summary: ISO 37 (rubber tensile), σu≈30 MPa @ ε≈600%, hyperelastic 비선형 거동 (NIST/MatWeb 공개 자료 representative)
author: NIST / MatWeb (representative)

sections.title: 시험 조건
sections.content_text: ISO 37 표준 인장시험 (dumbbell). strain rate 500 mm/min. 상온 23°C. Hardness Shore A 85.

sections.title: 물성 요약
sections.content_text: 선형 E 없음 (hyperelastic). σu≈30 MPa @ ε_f≈600%+ · 변곡: ε≈300% 부근부터 strain stiffening. Ogden/Mooney-Rivlin 적합 권장.

sections.title: 비고
sections.content_text: Representative public data. 고무 계열은 lot/sample 변동 큼. raw 곡선은 attachment 참조.

title: 316L stainless steel — uniaxial tensile test (representative)
summary: ASTM E8, E=193 GPa, σy≈290 MPa, σu≈579 MPa, ε_f≈50% (NIST/ASM/MatWeb 공개 자료 representative)
author: NIST / ASM Handbook / MatWeb (representative)

sections.title: 시험 조건
sections.content_text: ASTM E8 / E8M 표준 인장시험. 시편: standard round bar. strain rate 0.005/s. 상온 23°C. annealed condition.

sections.title: 물성 요약
sections.content_text: E=193 GPa · σy=290 MPa (0.2% offset) · σu=579 MPa · ε_f=50% · austenitic, 가공경화율 높음

sections.title: 비고
sections.content_text: Representative public data. 의료/식품 등급 광범위 사용. 실제 lot 별 변동 가능. raw 곡선은 attachment 참조.
